[finish]: Two distinct methods call `_format_bash_result` in src/kiss/agents/sorcar/useful_tools.py:

1. **`Bash`** (defined at line 856) — calls it twice, at lines 928 and 940, to format the result of a completed (or timed-out) non-streaming bash command.
2. **`_bash_streaming`** (defined at line 984) — calls it at line 1074 to format the final result of a streaming bash command.

Both are methods of the tools class in that module; no other enclosing methods reference the module-level helper `_format_bash_result`.
